# Hobbit Pipe

> [!info] 💧 Attachment · Cost: **0** · Spirit

*Item. Pipe.*

---

Attach to a **_Hobbit_** character. Limit 1 per character.
**Response:** After your threat is reduced by an event card effect, exhaust Hobbit Pipe to draw a card.
